overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a rural landscape. The character travels along a dirt path through grasslands and forest, passes ominous gallows, encounters wildlife, approaches a wooden village settlement, then turns and departs through marshy terrain.

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass toward a dirt path leading into the forest

entered.detail: tall green grass and wildflowers covering the meadow
white-barked birch trees scattered throughout the grassland
dense evergreen forest in the distance
narrow dirt trail winding through the meadow toward the forest

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks through an open grassy meadow with scattered birch trees under a partly cloudy sky. The character approaches a narrow dirt path that leads into a distant pine forest, with tall grass swaying in the breeze.

events.description: passing under wooden gallows with hanged bodies suspended from the beams

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt forest path passing beneath ominous gallows

entered.detail: tall wooden structure with crossbeams spanning the path
bodies suspended by ropes from the gallows beams

segments.scene_description: The path enters a denser forest section where imposing wooden gallows with hanged figures loom overhead. The atmosphere shifts to a darker tone as Geralt passes directly beneath the suspended bodies, with pine trees closing in on both sides.

events.description: deer crosses the path from left to right in front of the character
wooden village buildings become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding path as a deer crosses ahead and a village comes into view

notable_agents.action: deer crossing the path from left to right and running into the bushes

entered.detail: wooden thatched-roof structures of a small rural settlement
rustic wooden fence lining the approach to the village

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the forest path, a deer suddenly crosses from the left. The trees thin out to reveal a small wooden village in the distance, with rustic fences marking the settlement's edge and wooden buildings visible through the haze.

events.description: character stops at the village entrance and turns around to depart

agents.ego_description: approaching the village to observe the NPCs and buildings before deciding to turn back

notable_agents.action: villagers standing near the wooden buildings observing the surroundings

entered.detail: detailed wooden structures with thatched roofs and timber framing
small rustic shack with sloped roof near the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt reaches the outskirts of a small wooden village where several NPCs stand near rustic timber buildings. After approaching to observe the settlement, the character stops and turns around to leave, with the wooden structures and fences prominent in the foreground.

events.description: leaving the village area and entering marshy grassland with standing water

agents.ego_description: walking away from the village through marshy terrain with tall grasses

entered.detail: wetland grasses and reeds growing in marshy soil beside the path
abandoned wooden cart with broken wheels beside the trail

segments.scene_description: Walking away from the village, the terrain transitions to marshy grassland with patches of standing water. The character passes an abandoned broken cart lying beside the path, surrounded by tall reeds and grasses as the village disappears behind the trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural landscape that shifts from a bright meadow into a dark forest before ending in a desolate marsh. It begins with Geralt walking through an open grassy meadow with scattered birch trees, moving toward a narrow dirt path that leads into a dense pine forest. As the path narrows, the atmosphere turns ominous, passing directly beneath imposing wooden gallows with suspended figures before the trees thin out to reveal a small wooden village in the distance. The camera then follows the character into the settlement's outskirts among rustic timber buildings and NPCs, before turning away to depart from the village. Finally, the terrain transitions into marshy grassland with patches of standing water and an abandoned broken cart as the village disappears behind the trees.
